diff:
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index d76295c..db289b8 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -1,16 +1,29 @@
 from src.parsers import parse_optional_int
 
-DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
+def parse_bool(value: str) -> bool:
+    if value == "true":
+        return True
+    if value == "false":
+        return False
+    raise ValueError(f"invalid boolean: {value}")
+
 
+DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
 
 def load_settings(env: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, object]:
     settings = DEFAULTS.copy()
     if "APP_PORT" in env:
-        parsed_port = parse_optional_int(env["APP_PORT"])
+        port_value = env["APP_PORT"].strip()
+        parsed_port = parse_optional_int(port_value)
         if parsed_port is not None:
             settings["port"] = parsed_port
     if "APP_TIMEOUT" in env:
-        settings["timeout"] = env["APP_TIMEOUT"]
+        timeout_value = env["APP_TIMEOUT"].strip()
+        parsed_timeout = parse_optional_int(timeout_value)
+        if parsed_timeout is not None:
+            settings["timeout"] = parsed_timeout
     if "APP_DEBUG" in env:
-        settings["debug"] = env["APP_DEBUG"] == "true"
+        debug_value = env["APP_DEBUG"].strip().lower()
+        if debug_value != "":
+            settings["debug"] = parse_bool(debug_value)
     return settings
